title: A Developer Simulation of Building the Site
description: Simulate a developer asking Codex to build the site through MCP.

render.markdown:
# A Developer Simulation of Building the Site

The demo flow for this project was:

1. initialize the project with `anydocs init --agent codex`
2. call `project_open` and inspect `project_open.authoring`
3. read `anydocs://authoring/guidance` before multi-step edits
4. update the welcome page with `page_update`
5. create Codex-focused pages with `page_create_from_template` or `page_create`
6. set template metadata only when the selected template's `metadataSchema` allows it
7. verify the result with `page_list` and `nav_get`, then use navigation mutation tools when structure changes are needed
render.plainText: A developer simulation of building the site now starts with project_open and authoring discovery, reads anydocs://authoring/guidance for the detailed workflow, then creates or updates pages through MCP. Template metadata is only written when the selected template's metadataSchema allows it, and navigation changes use nav tools.
